title: Hyper-Realistic Crowd Editorial
prompt: Create a hyper-realistic wide cinematic editorial image with a massive crowd of celebrities from different eras. Keep lighting natural with golden rim highlights, shallow depth of field, calibrated skin tones, and rich material texture detail.

title: 2000s Mirror Selfie
prompt: Generate an early-2000s mirror selfie with a harsh digital-camera flash, nostalgic bedroom setting, pastel walls, pop-culture posters, and natural glam makeup. Keep style authentic with subtle grain and retro highlight behavior.

title: Business Portrait Generator
prompt: Keep face identity consistent from the reference image. Convert to a professional headshot with navy suit, white shirt, dark gray studio backdrop, classic three-point lighting, and realistic skin texture. Use portrait compression and clean color grading.

title: Film Look Coffee Portrait
prompt: Create a cinematic emotional portrait at golden hour near an urban coffee shop window with Kodak Portra 400 style grain, soft focus, warm tones, natural bokeh, and exact identity preservation.

title: 1990s Flash Portrait
prompt: Produce a 1990s direct-flash portrait with nostalgic room atmosphere, aesthetic posters, dim ambient light, tied messy hair, modern oversized sweater, and unchanged facial identity.

title: Product Hero Shot
prompt: Generate a premium product hero image on textured neutral background with one strong key light and one soft fill light. Add realistic shadows, reflection control, and commercial-grade composition suitable for storefront banners.

title: Apartment Interior Redesign
prompt: Reimagine this room into modern warm-minimal style: oak accents, matte black fixtures, layered ambient light, clutter removal, improved spatial flow, and realistic daylight color behavior while preserving architectural structure.

title: Old Photo Restoration
prompt: Restore the uploaded old portrait by removing scratches, repairing torn regions, correcting color fading, improving contrast, and enhancing fine details while preserving original identity and period authenticity.

title: Social Banner Variant Pack
prompt: Create three social media banner variants from the same concept: a dramatic hero version, a clean product-focused version, and a text-friendly version with negative space. Keep brand color consistency across all outputs.

title: Anime Spotlight Portrait
prompt: Generate a hyperrealistic anime portrait on pure black background using a narrow spotlight centered on the face. Keep sharp light cutoff, strong high-contrast falloff, long dark hair fading into shadows, and mysterious mood.
